cases.title: Organizer Admin views certificate-eligible and not-eligible lists per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Completed event with attendance finalized
At least one Attended participant evaluated Eligible and one Absent or missing-feedback participant evaluated NotEligible
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope to the event
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerAdminContext)
Inspect items array for both Eligible and NotEligible rows with reason fields
cases.expected: Paginated result includes entries with eligibility.result Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked when present; each row exposes registrationId, participantId, and non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; satisfies testing-plan §3 row: Organizer views eligible list → list + reasons available (AC-10, FR-21)

cases.title: Flow A organizer eligibility list shows outcomes with reasons after full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope to the event
Event configured with mandatory feedback
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization bearer token
Locate eligible participant row and any not-eligible row in response items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; eligible row shows result Eligible with reason fields; not-eligible rows (if present) show NotEligible with explanatory reasonText; completes Flow A organizer eligibility visibility step per FR-21

cases.title: listEligibility returns Eligible and NotEligible rows persisted in certificate_eligibilities
preconditions: Completed event with mix of Eligible and NotEligible evaluated registrations
certificate_eligibilities rows exist or are created on list access
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerAdminContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities table for returned registrationIds in the same database session
cases.expected: Paginated service result matches persisted rows for each registrationId; Eligible and NotEligible entries include non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; module-integration boundary per eligibility module transaction contract

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope with reason fields
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated Eligible and NotEligible participants
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope to the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization bearer token
Verify HTTP status, envelope fields (items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages), and eligibility payload on items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; each item includes registrationId, participantId, and eligibility object with result, reasonCode, and reasonText per API design §2.4 and §3

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin filters eligibility list to Eligible participants only
preconditions: Completed event with mix of Eligible and NotEligible evaluated registrations
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=Eligible&page=1&pageSize=20
Verify every item in response items array
cases.expected: HTTP 200; all returned items have eligibility.result Eligible with non-empty reason fields; NotEligible rows excluded from filtered view; Organizer Admin can isolate certificate-eligible participant list

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin filters eligibility list to NotEligible participants only
preconditions: Completed event with at least one NotEligible participant (e.g. missing mandatory feedback or Absent)
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=NotEligible&page=1&pageSize=20
Verify every item in response items array
cases.expected: HTTP 200; all returned items have eligibility.result NotEligible with non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; Eligible rows excluded; Organizer Admin can view not-eligible participant list with reasons for operational follow-up

cases.title: Organizer eligibility page displays eligible and not-eligible participant rows with reasons
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with access to a Completed event
At least one Eligible and one NotEligible eligibility row exist
Event eligibility management page reachable at organizer event route
steps: Navigate to organizer event eligibility page
Observe table columns for participant identity, eligibility result badge, and reason text
Switch segmented tabs (All, Eligible, Not eligible) if present
cases.expected: UI renders participant rows with terminal eligibility badge and human-readable reasonText for both Eligible and NotEligible outcomes; segmented views filter visible rows without loading unbounded datasets client-side per AC-14

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views Revoked eligibility in participant list with override reason
preconditions: Completed event with previously Eligible participant
OrganizerAdmin revoked eligibility with reasonCode and reasonText
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility with eligibility filter All or Revoked
Locate revoked participant entry in items
cases.expected: Entry shows eligibility.result Revoked with admin-provided reasonCode and reasonText; overriddenBy populated; Organizer Admin can see post-finalization eligibility changes in the operational list per BR-20

cases.title: OrganizerStaff can list eligibility for assigned event
preconditions: Completed event with Attended/Absent registrations and evaluated eligibility
OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event per scope rules
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerStaffContext)
cases.expected: Paginated result returns eligibility rows with reason fields for assigned event; staff operational list access scoped per GET /events/{eventId}/eligibility admin/staff-scope in API design

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET eligibility list returns 401
preconditions: Completed event with eligibility records
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; organizer eligibility participant lists not exposed to anonymous callers

cases.title: Participant cannot access organizer eligibility list endpoint
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility
Participant JWT for a registration on the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 forbidden; participant scoped to /eligibility/me only and cannot view other participants' eligibility lists

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin outside event organization scope cannot view eligibility list
preconditions: Completed event owned by another organization
OrganizerAdmin JWT without scope to target eventId
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility for out-of-scope eventId with admin context
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per assertEventScope; no cross-organization eligibility participant data leakage

cases.title: Invalid eligibility filter value returns 400 on list request
preconditions: Completed event with eligibility records
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=InvalidState&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_INPUT error code; no partial list data returned

cases.title: Eligibility list page beyond totalPages returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Completed event with known total eligibility row count
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=1 to read total and totalPages
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page={totalPages+1}&pageSize=1
cases.expected: Beyond-last-page response has items: [] with matching total and totalPages; pagination contract honored for organizer eligibility browsing per AC-13

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on eligibility list return 400
preconditions: Completed event
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=0&pageSize=20
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=101
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_PAGINATION for sub-1 page or pageSize above max (100)

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views empty eligibility list when no registrations finalized for evaluation
preconditions: Completed event with zero Attended or Absent registrations (e.g. all cancelled)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility for the event
cases.expected: Paginated envelope returns items: [] with total 0 and totalPages 0 or 1; Organizer Admin receives valid empty list rather than error

cases.title: First organizer list access evaluates and surfaces pending eligibility rows
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and no prior certificate_eligibilities row
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor triggers first list access
steps: Invoke listEligibility for the event
Inspect returned item for the registration without prior stored eligibility
cases.expected: List entry transitions from absent/PendingEvaluation to Eligible or NotEligible with reason fields in same request; Organizer Admin sees current deterministic outcome on first view without separate evaluation step

cases.title: Eligibility list returns paginated envelope with correct total and page boundaries
preconditions: Completed event with multiple Attended and Absent registrations evaluated
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Call listEligibility with page=1 pageSize=5
Verify page, pageSize, total, totalPages, and items.length
Request page 2 if totalPages > 1 and confirm slice continuity
cases.expected: Response matches pagination envelope contract; items.length <= pageSize; total reflects all finalized registrations in scope; totalPages equals ceil(total / pageSize) per FR-31 and API design section 3

cases.title: Every terminal eligibility list entry visible to Organizer Admin includes reason code and text
preconditions: Completed event with Eligible, NotEligible, and optionally Revoked participants
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: List all eligibility rows without filter
Inspect eligibility.reasonCode and eligibility.reasonText on each item with terminal result
cases.expected: All Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked rows expose non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; BR-19 satisfied for organizer certificate list visibility

cases.title: Eligibility list default sort orders by participantId ascending
preconditions: Completed event with at least three evaluated eligibility rows
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 without explicit sort parameter
Compare participantId ordering across consecutive items
cases.expected: HTTP 200; items returned in ascending participantId order per API design default sort for GET /events/{eventId}/eligibility; stable predictable browsing for Organizer Admin

cases.title: OrganizerStaff outside assigned event scope cannot view eligibility list
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility records
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to a different event, not the target eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility with OrganizerStaff Authorization bearer token for staff not assigned to the event
cases.expected: HTTP 403 forbidden per AC-10e; out-of-scope staff cannot view participant eligibility lists for unassigned events
